saved_test.name: Paraphrase and Reformulation: V3 All Levels
saved_test.description: Page-local V3 package for Paraphrase and Reformulation with A1-C2 coverage.

questions.question: Choose the natural formal-English option for paraphrase meaning preservation: {a1}

a1.answer: This does not necessarily mean that the results are incorrect
options: This does not necessarily mean that the results are incorrect
This proves that the results are incorrect
This means necessarily the results incorrect are
This says the results are totally wrong
a1.verb_hint: Choose the option that preserves meaning and formal register.

questions.question: Choose the natural formal-English option for reformulation for clarity: {a1}

a1.answer: In other words the method reduces the risk of error
options: In other words the method reduces the risk of error
In other words the method causes more errors
In words other the method reduces risk the
The method is kind of good for errors
a1.verb_hint: Choose the option that preserves meaning and formal register.

questions.question: Choose the natural formal-English option for formal restatement: {a1}

a1.answer: The author restates the argument in formal terms
options: The author restates the argument in formal terms
The author says the argument again in a fancy way
The author restates argument the in terms formal
The author changes the argument completely
a1.verb_hint: Choose the option that preserves meaning and formal register.

questions.question: Choose the natural formal-English option for sentence transformation: {a1}

a1.answer: The sentence can be reformulated without changing meaning
options: The sentence can be reformulated without changing meaning
The sentence can be reformulated by changing meaning
The sentence reformulate can without meaning changing
The sentence can become different in meaning
a1.verb_hint: Choose the option that preserves meaning and formal register.

questions.question: Choose the natural formal-English option for precise verbs: {a1}

a1.answer: The author clarifies this idea in the following section
options: The author clarifies this idea in the following section
The author talks about this idea in the next bit
The author makes clear this idea following section
The author unclear this idea in next section
a1.verb_hint: Choose the option that preserves meaning and formal register.

questions.question: Choose the natural formal-English option for replacing vague wording: {a1}

options: The proposal addresses several important issues

questions.question: Choose the natural formal-English option for clarifying logical relation: {a1}

a1.answer: As a result the procedure became more reliable
options: As a result the procedure became more reliable
Although the procedure became more reliable

The procedure reliable became as result
a1.verb_hint: Choose the option that preserves meaning and formal register.

questions.question: Choose the natural formal-English option for reducing informal tone: {a1}

a1.answer: We are unable to confirm this claim
options: We are unable to confirm this claim

We unable are to confirm this claim
a1.verb_hint: Choose the option that preserves meaning and formal register.
